betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Stamps§f

§aCreate the stamps needed to shape metal in your burner press.§f

Stamps are the tool heads used by the §bBurner Press§f to shape metal. Different stamp shapes produce different components.

§6Stamp Types§f:
§b• Flat Stamp§f: Basic shaping
§b• Plate Stamp§f: Ingots → plates
§b• Wire Stamp§f: Ingots → wires
§b• Circuit Stamp§f: Advanced circuits

§6Crafting§f:
Flat stamps are crafted at a table from bricks and iron ingots. Variants are made at the anvil. Higher-tier stamps (steel, titanium, desh) last longer.

§eTip§f: Start with an §biron flat stamp§f and an §biron plate stamp§f — they cover the most common early-game recipes.
